quote.text: When you work on a 52x11' series, you have to deal with an insane amount of deliveries. Fortunately, with Kitsu, everything was running smoothly.
quote.author: Cécile Hergaux, Head of Studio at Cube Creative

panels.title: For Producers
descriptions: The producer has a comprehensive view of the production. They can verify any information from the client or the contractor.

Kitsu allows the producer to see the financial status of the production, including where money is spent and why. They can identify the most costly shots or assets. Thanks to the charts, they always know how the production is progressing.
The producer doesn't depend on others to see the progress of the show. No one has to stop working to provide updates. The producer can independently view the progress of a sequence in real-time.

panels.title: For Production Managers
descriptions: As a Production Manager, you need to track production costs and know what has been reviewed and how many retakes have occurred.
Kitsu provides efficient timesheets where you can see the number of hours spent by each artist per day, week, or month for all productions.
For each shot or asset, you can see the overall time spent on it. This helps identify entities that are too costly. You can set estimates for each task and compare them to the actual time spent.
The statistics page allows you to write your producer report faster. You don't have to chase down information. It shows you the production's progress in real-time.
You don't need to spend time gathering files for daily or weekly reviews. With the playlist page, you can set up reviews quickly and ensure nothing is missed.

panels.title: For Directors
descriptions: Directors have an efficient way to review pending tasks and stay aware of what's happening in production. This allows them to react quickly and avoid the team wasting time due to incorrect directions.

Kitsu provides a playlist system: the Director can review multiple shots consecutively, whether pending reviews or the entire movie. Kitsu includes editing functions such as changing the shot order or switching versions on the fly, allowing the Director to be more precise about what they want to see.

panels.title: For Supervisors
descriptions: Supervisors need instant access to information at all times. They don't want to search for the right spreadsheet or file to comment on.
Fortunately, with Kitsu, everything is in one place. Supervisors don't have to wait for others to know what to do. They always know what to review and which retakes need to be done.
Task assignments, mentions, and comments ensure that information is always sent to the right person efficiently. Ultimately, supervisors have everything at hand to make and share the right decisions.

panels.title: For Artists
descriptions: Artists need quick access to their tasks and a simple way to communicate about their work by posting comments and previews.
When artists log in, they land on their to-do list. At a glance, they see what tasks they need to complete.
All tasks are properly detailed: due date, estimation, priority level, current status, and the latest comment.

With a single click, artists can open a comment panel without leaving their to-do list. It's very fast to respond or send a new preview. Through the notification system (in-app, email, or Slack), they know when something happens.

reasons.title: Why you should use Kitsu for your TV Series production
items: Get an overview of the progress of all your episodes
Run full episode reviews through a single playlist with external collaborators
Keep track of retake numbers and build report easily
